title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Marathon Realty

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Marathon Realty
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
